item.title: Bethesda Game is Permanently Shutting Down This Month
item.description: Only a month remains for players to access this Bethesda game before it goes offline on June 30, marking the latest shutdown from the company.

item.title: Is The National Weather Service Shutting Down?
item.description: The federal government shutdown on Wednesday as lawmakers were unable to reach an agreement on a spending budget. Here are answers to a few of the most common weather related questions we’re seeing.

item.title: Two Xbox Games Are Shutting Down Their Servers In June 2026
item.description: Let's start with those two games. The big one here is Battlefield Hardline, which just recently was delisted back on May 22nd, and it'll be shutting down its servers on June 22nd. This means all ...

item.title: EA Game is Shutting Down on June 24
item.description: Matthew is a journalist in the news department at GameRant. He holds a Bachelor's degree in journalism from Kent State University and has been an avid gamer since 1985. Matthew formerly served as a ...

item.title: Amazon’s Once Massively Popular MMO Is Going On Life Support
item.description: New World at one point had over a million concurrent players on Steam, but will no longer get new content updates in 2026 Amazon Amazon Game Studios MMO New World Amazon Game Studios has announced ...

item.title: PS4 Exclusive Game Shutting Down Permanently This Year
item.description: More specifically, GungHo Online Entertainment and Grasshopper Manufacture have announced that Let It Die is shutting down on August 31. This not only impacts PlayStation users, but PC users as well, ...

item.title: Is Rec Room actually shutting down in 2026? Here’s the truth
item.description: If you’ve spent any time in virtual hangout spaces over the last decade, chances are you’ve heard of Rec Room. The social gaming platform became a staple for millions of players who used it to hang ...

item.title: The Biggest Repository of Retro Video Games Is Shutting Down
item.description: One of the largest online repositories of retro video games is shutting down, which is a big blow to preservation. In the past, I’ve written about the importance of video game preservation, which ...

item.title: Fan-Favorite PS5, PS4 EA Games Shutting Down in 2026
item.description: A pair of popular 2021 and 2022 PS5 and PS4 games are shutting down in 2026, publisher Electronic Arts has announced. Frankly, we’re surprised that NHL 22 and NHL 23 are still online, but they won’t ...
